name: ChatGPT
summary: Route ChatGPT, OpenAI API, OpenAI platform, and Codex traffic through DAM.

commands.label: Run OpenAI-compatible tools through explicit-proxy fallback

notes: ChatGPT, Codex, and OpenAI API clients keep their normal endpoint and authentication configuration; DAM does not write a custom provider or base URL.
Network Extension capture is primary for installed builds. The proxy env fallback is retained for source builds and unsupported environments.
`dam integrations apply chatgpt` ensures a DAM-owned JSON profile file under the integration profile directory; it does not mutate app settings or shell startup files.

API-key mode routes api.openai.com through the HTTP adapter. ChatGPT-login mode routes chatgpt.com and ab.chatgpt.com through the WebSocket adapter. Legacy chat.openai.com and platform.openai.com are covered as HTTPS routes.
OPENAI_API_KEY stays owned by the caller or the user's shell; DAM forwards caller auth headers.
